success.description: The Chaotic nature of the daemons begins to warp reality around it, creating panic in nearby targets, making the daemon more difficult to oppose. While this action is recharging, all enemies engages with the daemon add to their skill checks
While this action is recharging, all enemies within close range of the daemons add to their skill checks
While this action is recharging, all enemies within close range of the daemons add to their skill checks

boon.description: Add 1 additional recharge token to this action

chaosStar.description: The daemon and all targets engaged with it suffer the Weakened condition while this action is recharging

success.description: Your Chaotic nature begins to warp reality around you, creating panic in nearby targets, making you more difficult to oppose. While this action is recharging all enemies engaged with you add to the skill checks
While this action is recharging, all enemies within close range of you add to their skill checks
As above, and all enemies within close range suffer 1 fatigue and 1 stress

boon.description: Add 1 additional recharge token to this action

chaosStar.description: You and all targets engaged with you gain the Sluggish condition for 2 rounds
